mapper.sql: al.id, al.operator_id AS operatorId, ua.display_name AS operatorName, ua.role_code AS operatorRole, al.action_type AS actionType, al.target_type AS targetType, al.target_id AS targetId, al.target_label AS targetLabel, al.old_value AS oldValue, al.new_value AS newValue, al.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_logs ( operator_id, action_type, target_type, target_id, target_label, old_value, new_value ) VALUES ( #{operatorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetLabel}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM audit_logs al LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.id = al.operator_id ORDER BY al.created_at DESC, al.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
